_meta.description: FROZEN config for the Leka Wood-Products internal order portal. Single source of truth for order number format, Slack channel, Xero fallback, auth rules, and pricing formula. Do not duplicate these values in code — read from this file.

slack._architect_leads_note: New architect registrations land here for manual approval. Bot @ai_agents has been invited.

pricing._fx_note: Frankfurter.app publishes ECB mid-market rates — free, no API key, JSON. The 3% buffer approximates the spread between ECB mid and what a Thai bank would charge on a TT Selling transaction (covers bank margin + swift/wire fees). Final FX = api_rate * (1 + fx_buffer_pct/100). Falls back to fx_thb_per_usd_fallback when the API is unreachable.
pricing._landed_note: Covers ocean freight FCL-40, import duty, VAT on import, local handling. landed_cost_thb_per_m = sku_map.line_m_price_usd * fx * landed_multiplier.
pricing._markup_note: default_unit_price_thb = landed_cost_thb_per_m * default_markup. Sales adjusts via per-line GM slider.
pricing._fence_sku_note: Premium uses LKP-FN-161-20 (Anhui Aolo 161.5×20 co-ex). Classic currently has no Heritage fence SKU in the vendor map, so we price it off the same board with a fence_classic_price_ratio discount that reflects the solid-WPC vs co-ex cost gap. Replace fence_sku_classic with a real LKH-FN-... SKU once it lands and set the ratio to 1.0.
pricing._fence_structural_uplift_note: Per-metre uplift covering aluminium posts, rails, concrete footings, fasteners and install allowance not priced off the board SKU. Rolled into indicative retail.
pricing._fence_gate_hardware_note: Flat retail add-on per gate (hardware + frame + install allowance). Single = 1.2 m leaf, Double = 2.4 m pair. Indicative only; Sales finalises.

legacy_public_routes._note: These routes must remain untouched by the order portal.

architect_portal._note: Flags for the architect-facing extension to Firebase Auth.
architect_portal._price_precision_note: Round displayed retail figure to nearest N THB so indicative pricing doesn't imply false precision.
